ls
ssh prod-web1.example.com
ssh -p 2222 user@db1
ssh -i ~/.ssh/foo_ed25519 ops@bastion.example.com
ssh -L 8080:localhost:80 jumpbox
ssh -J jump1,jump2 final.example.com
sshfs me@nfs:/srv /mnt/nfs
ssh-add ~/.ssh/id_ed25519
ssh-keygen -t ed25519
ssh-copy-id newhost
ssh
ssh -
git pull
ssh weird/path
ssh PROD-web1.example.com
